message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, BookOpen, Users } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Trello: Complete Guide & Progression 2026",
  description: "Master the JoJo-inspired Roblox world with our Bizarre Lineage Trello guide. Learn about Stands, fast leveling, and Prestige 1 strategies for 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Trello+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage Trello**: The primary resource for Stand rarities, NPC locations, and evolution paths.
- **Prestige 1 Goal**: Reach max level and obtain the **Blood Lust** perk immediately for PVE dominance.
- **Fast Leveling**: Use the **Treadmill** for a 1.5x EXP buff and focus on PVE missions or alt-killing.
- **Stand Acquisition**: Use **Stand Arrows** obtained through the storyline until you roll a high-tier Stand.
- **Essential Perk**: Get **Conjurer** early to double your meditation speed for skill unlocking.
</Callout>

Entering the world of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure on Roblox can be overwhelming, but the **bizarre lineage trello** serves as your ultimate roadmap for survival and power. Whether you are a new player looking to roll your first Stand or a veteran aiming for the Journey to Heaven evolution, understanding the core mechanics is vital. This guide synthesizes the most up-to-date information from the official **bizarre lineage trello** and community experts to ensure your progression is as efficient as possible.

In Bizarre Lineage, every choice—from the items you hoard to the NPCs you interact with—shapes your combat potential. The game features a complex web of Stands, sub-abilities, and fighting styles that require precise knowledge to master. By leveraging the official resources and following our strategic breakdown, you will transform from a basic user into a top-tier combatant in no time. Let's dive into the essential links, mechanics, and strategies that define the 2026 meta.

<Section icon={Map} title="Official Bizarre Lineage Trello and Community Hubs">

The official **bizarre lineage trello** is the most reliable source for real-time updates on Stand stats, item rarities, and map changes. Because the developers update the board frequently, it should be your first stop whenever a new patch drops. Alongside the Trello, the Discord server is where you will find active codes and a community ready for raids.

**Video Highlights:**
- **Storyline Start**: Begin the main quest immediately to earn free Stand Arrows.
- **Meditation Speed**: Learn how the Conjurer perk significantly reduces the grind for skills.
- **Prestige Priority**: Why Blood Lust is the first perk you must buy after your first prestige.
- **PVE Efficiency**: Identifying the fastest missions to reach max level quickly.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="XY1zcmXeSdg" title="FASTEST BEGINNER GUIDE TO PRESTIGE 1" />

<Callout type="info" title="Official Resource Links">
- **Official Trello Board**: [Bizzare Lineage Trello](https://trello.com/b/Zi6UTMnO/official-bizzare-lineage-%E2%9E%B5)
- **Discord Server**: Join the official server for announcements, sneak peeks, and active community codes.
</Callout>

The Trello board is organized into columns like Regions, Stands, Progression, and Game Mechanics. If you are looking for specific evolution requirements, such as how to unlock Vampire or the Stone Mask's exact spawn locations, the Trello provides the granular data that simple guides often miss.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Step-by-Step Progression to Prestige 1">

Reaching Prestige 1 is the first major milestone in Bizarre Lineage. It resets your level but unlocks the ability to purchase permanent, overpowered perks that define your late-game build. Follow this optimized path to hit your first prestige in record time.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initial Storyline & Stand Rolling">
    Start the main storyline immediately. The quests are straightforward and provide several Stand Arrows. Use these arrows until you obtain a Stand you enjoy. High-tier options like Star Platinum or The World are excellent, but even Magician's Red is viable for early leveling.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Unlock the Conjurer Perk">
    Head to the Aval raid as soon as you are strong enough. Your goal is to obtain the **Conjurer** perk. This is non-negotiable for fast progression because it doubles the speed of your meditation, allowing you to unlock your Stand's full move set twice as fast.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Skill Meditation & Leveling">
    Once you have Conjurer, alternate between PVE missions and meditation. Meditation is the fastest way to gain skill points. If the storyline quests become too difficult or tedious, switch to the PVE mission board for consistent experience gains.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="The Prestige Reset">
    Upon reaching the maximum level, travel to the Prestige NPC. After resetting, your primary objective is to buy the **Blood Lust** perk. This perk provides massive sustain in PVE and is widely considered the most important upgrade for any serious player.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="tip" title="Meditation Secret">
Always meditate in a safe zone. With the Conjurer perk active, you can max out your skill tree in a fraction of the time it takes through standard combat alone.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Stands, Items, and Combat Mechanics">

The core of your power comes from your Stand. The **bizarre lineage trello** lists a variety of Stands, each with unique rarities and evolution paths. Understanding which items are needed for these evolutions is key to planning your ultimate build.

| Stand Name | Type | Combat Style | Evolution Potential |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Star Platinum** | Power/Close Range | High DMG, Time Stop | High (SPTW) |
| **The World** | Power/Close Range | High DMG, Time Stop | High (TWOH) |
| **Whitesnake** | Utility/Ranged | Disc Steal, Stun | High (C-Moon/MIH) |
| **Magician's Red** | Burn/AoE | Fire Damage, Ranged | Moderate |
| **The Hand** | Erasure/Burst | High Burst, Gap Close | Moderate |
| **Killer Queen** | Explosive | Trap-based, Burst | High (Bites the Dust) |

Beyond Stands, you must manage your inventory and understand the utility of key items found throughout the world.

| Item Name | Rarity | Primary Use | How to Obtain |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Stand Arrow** | Common | Grants a random Stand | Story, Shop, Map Spawn |
| **Stone Mask** | Rare | Transforms user into Vampire | Map Spawn, Merchant |
| **Aja Fruit** | Legendary | Evolution material | World Events, Raids |
| **Requiem Arrow** | Mythic | Evolves specific Stands | High-level Raids |

<Callout type="warning" title="Inventory Management">
Do not discard Stone Masks or rare arrows. Even if they don't fit your current build, they are highly valuable for trading or for future evolutions once you prestige.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Fast Leveling and XP Exploits">

If you want to bypass the slow grind, there are several methods to accelerate your XP gain. The most effective involves utilizing environmental buffs and specific mission types found on the **bizarre lineage trello** map.

**XP Gain Methods Comparison:**

| Method | XP Rate | Difficulty | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **PVE Missions** | 4,000 XP | Low | None |
| **PVP Missions (Alt)** | 5,000 XP | Very Low | Multi-account manager |
| **Storyline Quests** | Variable | Medium | Combat Proficiency |
| **Delivery Quests** | 2,500 XP | Low | Patience (Annoying) |

<Callout type="success" title="The Treadmill Buff">
Before starting any mission, find the **Treadmill** in the training area. Using it grants a **1.5x EXP multiplier**. Always refresh this buff before turning in high-reward missions to maximize your gains.
</Callout>

For those with access to multiple accounts, the "Alt-Killing" method remains the fastest way to level. By queuing for PVP missions with an alt account in a private server, you can secure 5,000 XP per kill, which far outpaces standard PVE grinding.

</Section>

<Section icon={Users} title="Key NPCs and Quest Givers">

Knowing where to go is half the battle. The map in Bizarre Lineage is filled with NPCs that provide essential services, from selling items to resetting your stats.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Merchant NPC">
    - **Function**: Sells basic items and arrows.
    - **Location**: Main Hub / Town Square.
    - **Tip**: Check his stock every 30 minutes for rare items.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Rahaj (Shop NPC)">
    - **Function**: Specialized item shop.
    - **Location**: Near the Hotel area.
    - **Tip**: Best place to spend gold on utility items.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Jotaro Kujo">
    - **Function**: Main Storyline Giver.
    - **Location**: Starting Plaza.
    - **Tip**: Follow his quests for free progression items.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

| NPC Name | Role | Location |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Gardner Gwen** | Side Quest Giver | Garden District |
| **Polnareff** | Combat Trainer | Training Grounds |
| **Sub Ability NPC** | Skill Unlocks | Hidden Alcove |
| **Prestige NPC** | Level Reset | Mountain Peak |

<Callout type="info" title="NPC Tracking">
If you can't find an NPC, refer to the "Regions" section of the **bizarre lineage trello**. It provides a detailed map layout that highlights exactly where these characters reside.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={BookOpen} title="Essential Perks and Builds">

As you progress toward the end-game in 2026, your build will be defined by the perks you select after each prestige. While there are many options, two stand out as mandatory for any competitive player.

**Top Tier Perks:**
- **Blood Lust**: This is the gold standard for PVE. It allows you to heal based on the damage you deal, making high-difficulty raids and boss fights significantly easier.
- **Conjurer**: Essential for the early to mid-game. It cuts your meditation time in half, which is the primary bottleneck for unlocking Stand skills.

<Checklist
  id="build-milestones"
  title="End-Game Build Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Reach Prestige 1 and purchase Blood Lust",
    "Max out Stand skills via Conjurer-boosted meditation",
    "Obtain a Stone Mask if pursuing a Vampire hybrid build",
    "Collect 10 Stand Arrows for future rolling",
    "Complete the Aval Raid at least 5 times for rare drops"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="tip" title="Build Synergy">
When choosing a fighting style to complement your Stand, look for synergies in the Trello. For example, Vampire pairs exceptionally well with Close Range Stands like The Hand due to the added sustain and stun capabilities.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Where can I find the official Bizarre Lineage Trello link?",
    answer: "The official Trello can be found at https://trello.com/b/Zi6UTMnO/official-bizzare-lineage-%E2%9E%B5. It is updated regularly by the developers with the latest game data."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the fastest way to level up in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "The fastest method is using the Treadmill for a 1.5x XP buff, then completing PVP missions by defeating an alt account. If playing solo, PVE missions are the next best option."
  },
  {
    question: "Should I buy Blood Lust or Conjurer first?",
    answer: "Buy Conjurer first during your initial run to speed up skill unlocks. Once you reach Prestige 1, Blood Lust should be your absolute priority for its healing capabilities."
  },
  {
    question: "Does the Trello board include active codes?",
    answer: "No, the Trello board generally does not list codes. You should check the official Discord server or a dedicated codes guide for the latest rewards."
  }
]} />

</Section>
